results.name: morning star
results.description: A spiked ball on a sturdy rod. Not to be confused with a [mace].

results.name: morph ball
results.description: A visual element associated with morphs on Tarkir, seen as an orange energy ball.

results.name: morphling
results.description: Cards with flowstone and capacity to gain additional abilities or evasion.

results.name: morph spider
results.description: A visual element associated with morphs on Dominaria

results.name: mossdog
results.description: It's like a dog but moss.

results.name: motley
results.description: A multicolored jester's outfit.

results.name: mount & rider
results.description: A creature that's mounted or being ridden, and its rider.

results.name: mox
results.description: Art depicting the various Moxen cards.

results.name: moxen
results.description: Artifacts that cost {0} and tap for mana that have the "Mox" name. Named after the original Mox cycle from Alpha.

results.name: mr. handy
results.description: A three-armed robot from the Fallout Universe

results.name: mulch
results.description: An effect that filters cards at the top of the library, putting remainders into the graveyard.

results.name: multicast
results.description: A spell that involves casting multiple spells. (Not copying, but actually casting.)

results.name: multi character card
results.description: This card represents multiple distinct identifiable characters on one face. Avoid using this for nameless mobs.

results.name: multiclass party member
results.description: Creatures that are each of the four party classes.

results.name: multi land ramp
results.description: Land ramp that (potentially) nets two or more lands on your side of the battlefield

results.name: multiplayer
results.description: Cards that interact with all of the players in the game. They might scale with the number of players or affect the turn order for example.

results.name: multiple arms
results.description: Subjects with more than two arms.

results.name: multiple bodies
results.description: One-shot effects that put two or more creatures onto the battlefield on resolution.

results.name: multiple eyes
results.description: Creatures with three or more eyes (Yes two eyes is still multiple but shh)

results.name: multiple species types
results.description: Creatures that have two or more types that are considered to be a species, such as "Human" or "Elf"

results.name: multiple targets
results.description: These cards can target more than one object or player. Not mutually exclusive with [single target instant/sorcery](/tags/card/single-target-instant-sorcery).

results.name: multi removal
results.description: Removal for more than one, but less than all.  See also [spot removal](spot-removal) and [sweeper](sweeper).
